title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Skill Lint — Lint ClawHub SKILL.md files: frontmatter, structure, command...
content:
Lint ClawHub SKILL.md files: frontmatter, structure, command docs, thin-content detection

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/skill-lint
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/skill-lint

#ClawHub #OpenClaw #AIAgent #Python #DevTools
